---
title: "CNRM-ESM2-1 Full Pipeline Runbook"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_depth: 2
    theme: readable
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(eval = FALSE)
```

# Purpose

Run one full IPCC/ESGF model through the ocean downscaling pipeline, step by step:

- standardize/regrid monthly files
- audit units and depth metadata
- vertically interpolate 3D variables
- build climatology windows
- calculate future-minus-historical deltas
- add deltas to trusted baselines

This runbook is for:

```text
MODEL  : CNRM-ESM2-1
MEMBER : auto
SCENARIOS : historical, ssp126, ssp245, ssp585
VARIABLES : thetao so uo vo zos mlotst siconc chl o2 ph zooc
WINDOWS   : baseline, 2030-2060, 2050-2060, 2090-2100
```

# Product Logic

```text
thetao so uo vo zos mlotst siconc
  -> GLORYS baseline
  -> delta regridded to GLORYS 0p05, following CESM-to-GLORYS logic
  -> final downscaled output at 0p05 only

chl o2 ph
  -> hindcast BGC baseline
  -> delta regridded to hindcast 0p25 anomaly grid
  -> final downscaled output at 0p05 and 0p25

zooc
  -> run through monthly, climatology, and delta
  -> stop after delta because no trusted target baseline is configured
```

Important distinction:

```text
delta_windows_0p05 is the internal anomaly product for GLORYS-target variables.
delta_windows_0p25 is the internal anomaly product for hindcast-target variables.
Neither is the same thing as final /downscaled/<var>/0p25 output.
```

# Shared Setup

Run this once in the cluster shell before starting the steps.

```{bash}
cd /home/sandbox-sparc/cesmle-ocn-fetch

export MODELS="CNRM-ESM2-1"
export MEMBER="auto"

export SCENARIOS_ALL="historical ssp126 ssp245 ssp585"
export SCENARIOS_FUTURE="ssp126 ssp245 ssp585"

export VARS="thetao so uo vo zos mlotst siconc chl o2 ph zooc"
export VARS_3D="thetao so uo vo chl o2 ph zooc"

export WINDOWS_ALL="baseline 2030-2060 2050-2060 2090-2100"
export WINDOWS_FUTURE="2030-2060 2050-2060 2090-2100"

export GLORYS_ROOT="/home/SB5/reanalysis/glorys12v1/monthly_0p05"
export HINDCAST_ROOT="/home/SB5/reanalysis/global_ocean_biogeochemistry_hindcast/monthly_0p05_glorys_coast"
export HINDCAST_0P25_ROOT="/home/SB5/reanalysis/global_ocean_biogeochemistry_hindcast/monthly_0p25"
```

# Step 1: Monthly Standardize/Regrid

```{bash}
SCENARIOS="$SCENARIOS_ALL" \
bash scripts/runners/ipcc_esgf/run_temporal_aggregate_regrid.sh
```

After submission, check jobs with `sacct` using the job IDs printed by the runner.

# Step 2: Unit/Depth/Add-Stage Audit

```{bash}
SCENARIOS="$SCENARIOS_ALL" \
MEMBERS="auto" \
FILE_STAGE="parts" \
COMPUTE_STATS="no" \
GLORYS_ROOT="$GLORYS_ROOT" \
HINDCAST_ROOT="$HINDCAST_ROOT" \
OUT_FILE="data/manifests/unit_depth_audit_CNRM-ESM2-1_full.csv" \
bash scripts/tools/audit_units_and_depths.sh
```

Inspect the key columns:

```{bash}
cut -d, -f1,2,3,4,15,25,26,27,28,29,30,31 \
  data/manifests/unit_depth_audit_CNRM-ESM2-1_full.csv
```

Expected high-level interpretation:

```text
thetao so uo vo zos mlotst siconc -> target baseline should be glorys
chl o2 ph                         -> target baseline should be hindcast
zooc                              -> no trusted add baseline
```

This audit also checks add-stage assumptions before Step 6. The important
columns are:

```text
suggested_anomaly_scale
suggested_output_bounds
add_stage_status
```

For the current GLORYS-target defaults:

```text
siconc -> anomaly scale 0.01, final bounds 0:1
mlotst -> final bounds 0:
so     -> final bounds 0:
```

These defaults handle the known scale/bounds cases:

```text
siconc CMIP/IPCC deltas are percentage points, while GLORYS siconc is fraction.
mlotst and so use compatible units, but final products are physically nonnegative.
```

# Step 3: Vertical Interpolation

Only run 3D variables through vertical interpolation.

```{bash}
SCENARIOS="$SCENARIOS_ALL" \
VARS="$VARS_3D" \
TARGET_REF_FILE="$GLORYS_ROOT/thetao/parts/glorys12v1_thetao_200601.monmean.0p05.nc" \
bash scripts/runners/ipcc_esgf/run_vertical_interpolate_to_reference.sh
```

2D variables are not vertically interpolated:

```text
zos mlotst siconc
```

# Step 4: Climatology Windows

```{bash}
SCENARIOS="$SCENARIOS_ALL" \
WINDOWS="$WINDOWS_ALL" \
bash scripts/runners/ipcc_esgf/run_climatology_window.sh
```

Expected window logic:

```text
historical -> baseline, meaning 2006-2014
ssp126     -> 2030-2060, 2050-2060, 2090-2100
ssp245     -> 2030-2060, 2050-2060, 2090-2100
ssp585     -> 2030-2060, 2050-2060, 2090-2100
```

# Step 5: Future-Minus-Historical Deltas

```{bash}
SCENARIOS="$SCENARIOS_FUTURE" \
WINDOWS="$WINDOWS_FUTURE" \
bash scripts/runners/ipcc_esgf/run_delta_from_climatologies.sh
```

Expected delta modes:

```text
chl    -> log_ratio
others -> additive
```

Expected delta products:

```text
thetao so uo vo zos mlotst siconc -> delta_windows/ plus delta_windows_0p05/
chl o2 ph                         -> delta_windows/ plus delta_windows_0p25/
zooc                              -> delta_windows/ only
```

# Step 6: Add Deltas To Trusted Baselines

Dry-run first:

```{bash}
SCENARIOS="$SCENARIOS_FUTURE" \
WINDOWS="$WINDOWS_FUTURE" \
GLORYS_ROOT="$GLORYS_ROOT" \
HINDCAST_ROOT="$HINDCAST_ROOT" \
REGRID_GRIDFILE="$HINDCAST_0P25_ROOT/grid_0p25_global.txt" \
RUN=no \
bash scripts/runners/ipcc_esgf_to_hindcast/run_add_anomaly_to_baseline_with_coastal_fill.sh
```

Confirm the printed policy:

```text
chl o2 ph                         -> REGRID OUTPUT : yes
thetao so uo vo zos mlotst siconc -> REGRID OUTPUT : no
zooc                              -> warning/skip, no trusted baseline
```

Then submit:

```{bash}
SCENARIOS="$SCENARIOS_FUTURE" \
WINDOWS="$WINDOWS_FUTURE" \
GLORYS_ROOT="$GLORYS_ROOT" \
HINDCAST_ROOT="$HINDCAST_ROOT" \
REGRID_GRIDFILE="$HINDCAST_0P25_ROOT/grid_0p25_global.txt" \
RUN=yes \
bash scripts/runners/ipcc_esgf_to_hindcast/run_add_anomaly_to_baseline_with_coastal_fill.sh
```

# Slurm Monitoring

Use `sacct` after every submitted stage.

```{bash}
sacct -j JOBID1,JOBID2,JOBID3 \
  --format=JobID,JobName%24,State,ExitCode,Elapsed,AllocCPUS,MaxRSS,NodeList%24
```

Check logs:

```{bash}
grep -i "error\|fail\|traceback\|warn" \
  logs/*JOBID1* logs/*JOBID2* logs/*JOBID3*
```

If a job fails immediately with no log file and exit code similar to `0:53`, it may be a transient cluster node/startup issue. Re-submit that specific job or narrow variable/window rather than restarting the whole stage.

# Final Sanity Checks

GLORYS-target variables should not have final `0p25` folders:

```{bash}
find /home/SB5/downscaled/CNRM-ESM2-1/r1i1p1f2 \
  -type d \( -path "*/thetao/0p25" -o -path "*/so/0p25" -o -path "*/uo/0p25" -o -path "*/vo/0p25" -o -path "*/zos/0p25" -o -path "*/mlotst/0p25" -o -path "*/siconc/0p25" \) \
  -print
```

Expected: no output.

Hindcast-target variables may have final `0p25` folders:

```{bash}
find /home/SB5/downscaled/CNRM-ESM2-1/r1i1p1f2 \
  -type d \( -path "*/chl/0p25" -o -path "*/o2/0p25" -o -path "*/ph/0p25" \) \
  -print
```

Expected: `chl`, `o2`, and `ph` products for each completed future scenario/window.

List final NetCDF products:

```{bash}
find /home/SB5/downscaled/CNRM-ESM2-1/r1i1p1f2 \
  -type f -name "*.nc" | sort
```
